I love the fact that this movie is telling the story of something that actually happened, WHILE incorporating effects and camera shots that give nods to the gamers! The idea of combining a game adaptation AND a sports drama into one film, is such a unique spin on both genres! 

Also, that clip of Jann in his room and having the car assemble and materialize around him, transitioning to him in the race? That was so fucking cool!! I would LOVE to see the Corridor Crew talk about this movie, especially that specific shot!

Major kudos to those who made this movie. I was skeptical at first, but this trailer alone won me over 🙌❤️😎

The movie... It was so very impactful. Mostly because everything that took place was so "real". Often you go to movies and the people in it are doing things they would never do. An example here was how well they captured the relationship that Jann made with his new mentor and instructor. This movie is about how a man who thought he was done was destined to not only restart his own life, but the life of another as well. This movie should be the foundational program for anyone who wants to become a mentor, a leader and the hope of another human being.

I just saw this movie. I have to say that I went in skeptical. But this is probably one of, if not the best films based on a video game to date. Yes, I know it's not "based" on a video game, but the game does play a central role in the plot. Overall, a great story, and the leads have awesome chemistry.
We've actually had pretty good game film content. Mario, Detective Pikachu...TLOU, Castlevania, Arkane, Silent Hill.

@wkadalie Not Castlevania. As a Castlevania fan, I was disappointed with one fact : since when Death is not Mathias Cronqvist/Dracula Vlad Tepes' most trustworthy servant? Death is not an entity above Dracula, he IS Dracula' servant. And, Hector betrayed Dracula during his war against humanity (Castlevania Curse of Darkness occurs just after Castlevania 3 : Dracula's Curse), but in the anime, he didn't and was a slave instead of his life being reformed.
